jack_richards.name: Jack Richards
jack_richards.summary:
Out of Illinois, Jack Richards has tasted victory multiple times, currently competing at the U17 level, capturing 2 titles across 18 tournaments and 50 entries. Each win is earned through bracket battles against hungry opponents — and Jack keeps finding ways to come out on top.

Jack is known for playing up, regularly entering higher age groups and testing against older, more experienced opponents (3 tournaments with multi-age-group entries). That willingness to seek out tougher competition accelerates development in ways that playing it safe never can.

What makes Jack especially formidable is the versatility across all three disciplines — boasting 1 singles title, a doubles best of #2, 1 mixed doubles title. The ability to excel in all three formats reveals both individual brilliance and the court sense to thrive alongside a partner.

Career highlights: U.S. Selection Event participant (6 entries).

With 18 different doubles partners over the years, Jack adapts to anyone:
  • Charvi Srivastava (current primary partner) — 3 events together this season alone with 1 title, building serious momentum (8 total events in XD, spanning 4 seasons)
  • Kaylie Liu (current partner) — currently teaming up in XD (2 events, best: #4, across 2 seasons)

The 2025-2026 season has been a step up, with 1 title across 2 tournaments — a clear sign that Jack is still ascending.

Jack has been on this journey through U11, U13, U15, U17 — a multi-age-group career that few can match, accumulating invaluable experience at every level. That depth of competitive history is an asset younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

With tournaments spanning Midwest, NE, South, Jack isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 2 titles, Jack is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to dedication, talent, and love for the game.

jayden_ma.name: Jayden Ma
jayden_ma.summary:
Hailing from California, Jayden Ma has reached the podium at the ORC level (top-2), currently competing at the U19 level, competing against the best players in the region. Open Regional Championships are a significant step up from local events, and Jayden's results show the readiness for top-tier competition.

Jayden is known for playing up, regularly entering higher age groups and testing against older, more experienced opponents (4 tournaments with multi-age-group entries). That willingness to seek out tougher competition accelerates development in ways that playing it safe never can.

A true triple-threat, Jayden competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 1 singles title, 2 doubles titles, 2 mixed doubles titles. The ability to excel in all three formats reveals both individual brilliance and the court sense to thrive alongside a partner.

Career highlights: U.S. Selection Event participant (11 entries) • Junior Nationals competitor (9 entries) • ORC top-2 finisher.

Jayden has shown remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 26 different players across the career:
  • Christopher Gunawanr (current primary partner) — 21 events, 1 title together in BD/U13/U15/U17, spanning 5 seasons
  • rErica Chen Lin (current partner) — currently teaming up in XD (2 events)
  • rMaggie Zang (current partner) — 4 events, 1 title together in U13/XD, across 2 seasons

Jayden has been on this journey through U11, U13, U15, U17, U19 — a multi-age-group career that few can match, accumulating invaluable experience at every level. That depth of competitive history is an asset younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Jayden has competed across 6 different regions (Midwest, NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel the country and test the game against diverse competition from coast to coast.

With 5 seeded entries across the career, Jayden consistently earns the respect of tournament organizers.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 5 titles, Jayden is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to dedication, talent, and love for the game.
